file: Meemanah - 2023 - Bifunctional acid–base strontium–titanium mixed oxides supported on SBA-15 for selective synthesis o.txt

experiments.description: 在加压氮气气氛下，使用不同负载量和Sr:Ti摩尔比的STO/SBA15双功能酸碱催化剂，催化糠醛与2-丁酮进行交叉羟醛缩合反应，以选择性合成具有支链结构的C9不饱和酮（生物航煤前体）。优化条件为：4 wt% 20STO(2:1)/SBA15催化剂，糠醛:2-丁酮摩尔比1:5，反应温度180°C，反应时间5小时。
experiments.text_snippet: The aldol condensation was carried out batchwise under a pressurized nitrogen atmosphere... 20STO(2:1)/SBA15 was the suitable catalyst, realizing >99% furfural conversion and 78.3% C9B yield under the following optimized conditions: 4 wt% catalyst loading, 1:5 furfural:2-butanone molar ratio, 180 ◦C reaction temperature, and 5 h reaction time.

Catalyst type.original: Bifunctional acid-base strontium-titanium mixed oxides supported on SBA-15

Catalyst composition.original: STO/SBA15 with varying Sr:Ti molar ratios (1:2, 1:1, 2:1) and loadings (10-25 wt%)

Product.original: C9 unsaturated ketone with branched structure (C9B)
